name: Aha! Product Management API
what_it_does: Aha! REST API for product management platform covering roadmaps, features, ideas, and goals. Enables AI agents to query product roadmap data, retrieve feature specifications, manage ideas from the ideas portal, track strategic goals, and integrate product planning data into engineering and reporting workflows.
use_cases: Querying product roadmap and feature status from product intelligence agents
Retrieving customer idea votes and feedback from product discovery agents
Syncing feature status with engineering tools from workflow automation agents
Generating roadmap reports and release plans from product analytics agents
not_for: Engineering task management (use Jira/Linear for development)
Real-time operational data (Aha! is strategic planning focused)
best_when: A product team using Aha! wants AI agents to surface roadmap data, analyze idea portal trends, and integrate strategic planning context into engineering and executive workflows.
avoid_when: You manage product work in Jira or Linear directly — Aha! is overhead if you don't use its roadmapping layer.

auth.notes: Aha! supports API key and OAuth 2.0. API keys available in user profile. OAuth for user-level integrations.

pricing.notes: Per-user SaaS pricing. API access included with subscription. Trial available without credit card.

performance.rate_limits: Aha! API: rate limits apply per plan; throttle on burst

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Aha! product hierarchy (goals → initiatives → features) must be understood for data queries
Ideas portal data may contain sensitive competitive intelligence from customers
API key is user-scoped — use dedicated service account for agent access
Roadmap data can have complex interdependencies — retrieve full context before analysis
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product roadmap and customer ideas may contain sensitive competitive intelligence. SOC2, GDPR. API key and OAuth. GDPR compliance for Ideas portal customer data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Product strategy and customer ideas contain competitive intelligence. SOC2, GDPR. API key user-scoped.
